title: thelypteris cyclolepis
intro: Thelypteris cyclolepis, also known as the cyclolepid fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Thelypteris cyclolepis is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of various types of infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or a decoction for its herbal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
